chapter_blurb: Defines PlanUnits with sub-plans, Awardees, Workforce, Reasons, Facts, etc.
chapter_content: Defines PlanUnits. Plans are complicated. A plan can have sub plans, define itself as a pledge, define Awardees, assigned Workforce, required Reasons, etc.
ontology summary: PlanUnits are the most complicated concepts in Keg2. Plans are heirachical with child plans and a parent plan (unless its a root). Data in a plan can be sourced from the Parent Plan (Heirs) or the Child Plan (Lines). Plans desribute funds to Awardees. There is a lot.
